name: Filter
description: FilterBar (horizontal toolbar with a consumer-composed left slot, search input, Filter/Settings/Sort-by buttons), VerticalFilterItem (sidebar filter-category row, default/hover/active/disabled), VerticalFilterHeader (panel header with a Clear link), and VerticalFilterFooter (Clear/Apply footer).
sourceNote: FilterBar's Calendar-type left content (Today button + date-range ButtonGroup) and Table-type left content (SegmentedControl tabs, now its own component) are both fully assembled from existing/new primitives rather than hardcoded — passed in via the `left` slot, since the two variants differ too much to force into one rigid prop shape. VerticalFilterFooter reuses DrawerFooter's 'stretch' layout directly (identical Cancel/Continue-style button pairing, just relabeled Clear/Apply) rather than re-implementing an equivalent footer from scratch.
